[MicroLend] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists audit_logs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists borrower_groups cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists borrower_kyc cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists borrowers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists centre_meetings cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists centres cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists collection_records cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists credit_assessments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists delinquency_cases cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists loan_accounts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists loan_applications cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists loan_products cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists notifications cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists portfolio_reports cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists repayment_schedules cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sanction_letters cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table audit_logs ( auditid bigint generated by default as identity, timestamp timestamp(6), userid bigint, action varchar(255), module varchar(255), primary key (auditid) ) Hibernate: create table borrower_groups ( formation_date date, joint_liability_enabled boolean, member_count integer, centreid bigint, field_officerid bigint, groupid bigint generated by default as identity, group_name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','DISSOLVED','SUSPENDED')), primary key (groupid) ) Hibernate: create table borrower_kyc ( verification_date date, borrowerid bigint not null, kycid bigint generated by default as identity, verified_byid bigint, document_ref varchar(255), document_type varchar(255) check (document_type in ('NATIONAL_ID','VOTER_ID','PASSPORT','UTILITY_BILL')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','VERIFIED','REJECTED','EXPIRED')), primary key (kycid) ) Hibernate: create table borrowers ( date_of_birth date, monthly_income numeric(38,2), borrowerid bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint unique, bank_account_number varchar(255), district varchar(255), email varchar(255) unique, gender varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, nationalidnumber varchar(255) unique, occupation varchar(255), phone varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','BLACKLISTED','DECEASED')), village varchar(255), primary key (borrowerid) ) Hibernate: create table centre_meetings ( attendance_count integer, collection_amount numeric(38,2), meeting_date date, centreid bigint not null, conducted_byid bigint, meetingid bigint generated by default as identity, status varchar(255) check (status in ('SCHEDULED','CONDUCTED','MISSED','POSTPONED')), primary key (meetingid) ) Hibernate: create table centres ( meeting_time time(6), branchid bigint, centreid bigint generated by default as identity, field_officerid bigint, centre_name varchar(255) not null, meeting_day varchar(255) check (meeting_day in ('MONDAY','TUESDAY','WEDNESDAY','THURSDAY','FRIDAY','SATURDAY')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE')), village varchar(255), primary key (centreid) ) Hibernate: create table collection_records ( collected_amount numeric(38,2), collection_date date, collected_byid bigint, collectionid bigint generated by default as identity, loan_accountid bigint not null, scheduleid bigint, mode varchar(255) check (mode in ('CASH','BANK_TRANSFER','CENTRE_COLLECTION')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('RECEIVED','PARTIAL','EXCESS')), primary key (collectionid) ) Hibernate: create table credit_assessments ( assessment_date date, debt_burden_ratio numeric(38,2), internal_credit_score integer, assessed_byid bigint, assessmentid bigint generated by default as identity, borrowerid bigint not null, remarks varchar(1000), recommendation varchar(255) check (recommendation in ('ELIGIBLE','NOT_ELIGIBLE','CONDITIONAL')), primary key (assessmentid) ) Hibernate: create table delinquency_cases ( dpd integer, opened_date date, assigned_collections_officerid bigint, delinquencyid bigint generated by default as identity, loan_accountid bigint not null, action varchar(255) check (action in ('FIELD_VISIT','LEGAL_NOTICE','RESTRUCTURING','WRITE_OFF')), par_bucket varchar(255) check (par_bucket in ('PAR30','PAR60','PAR90','PAR180')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','WRITTEN_OFF')), primary key (delinquencyid) ) Hibernate: create table loan_accounts ( disbursed_amount numeric(38,2), disbursement_date date, dpd integer, outstanding_principal numeric(38,2), total_interest numeric(38,2), total_repayable numeric(38,2), applicationid bigint, borrowerid bigint, loan_accountid bigint generated by default as identity, productid bigint, status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','CLOSED','NPA','WRITTEN_OFF')), primary key (loan_accountid) ) Hibernate: create table loan_applications ( application_date date, requested_amount numeric(38,2), applicationid bigint generated by default as identity, borrowerid bigint not null, credit_officerid bigint, groupid bigint, loan_productid bigint not null, purpose varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('DRAFT','SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED','REJECTED','DISBURSED')), primary key (applicationid) ) Hibernate: create table loan_products ( interest_rate_percent numeric(38,2), max_amount numeric(38,2), min_amount numeric(38,2), processing_fee_percent numeric(38,2), tenure_months integer, productid bigint generated by default as identity, category varchar(255) check (category in ('INDIVIDUAL','GROUP_LENDING','MSME','AGRICULTURAL')), interest_type varchar(255) check (interest_type in ('FLAT','REDUCING')), product_name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','DISCONTINUED')), primary key (productid) ) Hibernate: create table notifications ( created_date timestamp(6), notificationid bigint generated by default as identity, userid bigint not null, message varchar(500), category varchar(255) check (category in ('REPAYMENT','DISBURSEMENT','MEETING','DELINQUENCY','COMPLIANCE')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('UNREAD','READ','DISMISSED')), primary key (notificationid) ) Hibernate: create table portfolio_reports ( active_loan_count integer, collection_rate numeric(38,2), disbursement_value numeric(38,2), generated_date date, npa_percent numeric(38,2), par30 numeric(38,2), par90 numeric(38,2), total_outstanding numeric(38,2), reportid bigint generated by default as identity, scope_refid bigint, scope varchar(255) check (scope in ('BRANCH','PRODUCT','FIELD_OFFICER','PERIOD')), primary key (reportid) ) Hibernate: create table repayment_schedules ( amount_paid numeric(38,2), due_date date, installment_number integer, interest_due numeric(38,2), paid_date date, principal_due numeric(38,2), total_due numeric(38,2), loan_accountid bigint not null, scheduleid bigint generated by default as identity, status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','PARTIAL','PAID','OVERDUE','WAIVED')), primary key (scheduleid) ) Hibernate: create table sanction_letters ( accepted_by_borrower boolean, emi_amount numeric(38,2), interest_rate numeric(38,2), issued_date date, sanctioned_amount numeric(38,2), tenure integer, applicationid bigint not null unique, sanctionid bigint generated by default as identity, disbursal_conditions varchar(1000), status varchar(255) check (status in ('ISSUED','ACCEPTED','LAPSED')), primary key (sanctionid) ) Hibernate: create table users ( branchid bigint, userid bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('BORROWER','FIELD_OFFICER','CREDIT_OFFICER','BRANCH_MANAGER','COLLECTIONS_OFFICER','ADMIN')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','SUSPENDED')), primary key (userid) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists borrowers add constraint FKiejj9gosdsn5ywqi1x7bev8du foreign key (user_id) references users 2026-06-14T14:10:49.573+05:30 INFO 35728 --- [MicroLend] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-14T14:10:51.689+05:30 INFO 35728 --- [MicroLend] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-14T14:10:53.462+05:30 WARN 35728 --- [MicroLend] [ main] Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering.
